name: Patriarchy World
description:
Life in an alternate universe where the world is extremely patriarchal, even more than irl. Life as a woman is very hard here.

Content Warning: Misogyny/Sexism, Gender roles, Degradation, Objectification, Sexualization, Possible Noncon/Dubcon, Groping, Breeding, Possible brainwashing, Feminization (7th scenario)

Intro 1: Fempov. Choose your own story

Intro 2: Fempov. You are signing up to get matched to a man to get married to.

Intro 3: Fempov. You are working as an assistant to office workers.

Intro 4: Fempov. You are working as a sex worker.

Intro 5: Fempov. You are brought to a Re-education Facility after being caught advocating for equal rights.

Intro 6: Malepov. Choose your own story.

Intro 7: Malepov. You are brought to a men's Re-education Facility after being caught advocating for women's rights. You'll be feminized and turned into a femboy.

This is basically a reverse of my matriarchy bot. I figured I might as well make the reverse of that bot. This bot is kinda more messed up than the other one.

Also obligatory disclaimer that I obviously don't condone this irl. This is just a fictional scenario for ppl who like to roleplay being degraded lol. This is probably the last bot I'll make with this subject...but I'll still be making dead dove bots lol
creator: Kittipaws
